events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from CPMC Van Ness for client 1072. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: gluten, egg. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 45–60 g/meal. Prefers Italian; dislikes eggplant. Cooking ability: microwave. 5 meals/week, zone Mission.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Matched: Tuscan White Bean Soup
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 413/800 mg ✓, carbs 53 g (target 45–60) ✓, no gluten/egg ✓.

events.title: Matched: Grilled Chicken with Creamy Polenta
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 445/800 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 45–60) ✓, no gluten/egg ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Piccata with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 474/800 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 45–60) ✓, no gluten/egg ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1072 added to route R-MISS-1 (Mission), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1072: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
